_comment: PatchSTG: Patch-based Spatial-Temporal Graph Neural Network
_description: Official LibCity configuration for PatchSTG model with KDTree-based spatial patching
_requirements: timm>=1.0.12 for Vision Transformer attention components
_tps_desc: Temporal patch size (input_window should be divisible by tps)
_tpn_desc: Number of temporal patches (= input_window / tps)
_spatial_patching: Configuration for spatial dimension via KDTree
_recur_desc: KDTree recursion depth. Adjust based on dataset: 7 for ~200 nodes, 8 for ~300 nodes, 9 for ~700+ nodes
_sps_desc: Spatial patch size (nodes per patch after padding)
_spn_desc: Spatial patch number (2^recur). Must match recur: recur=7→128, recur=8→256, recur=9→512
_factors_desc: Merging factor for leaf nodes in dual attention (spn/factors patches with sps*factors size each)
_id_desc: Input embedding dimension (from Conv2d temporal patching)
_tod_desc: Time slots per day (288 for 5min, 96 for 15min, 48 for 30min)
_max_epoch_desc: Reduced to 10 for quick testing, use 100 for full training
_batch_size_desc: Batch size (adjust based on GPU memory)
_lr_desc: Initial learning rate from original paper
_early_stop_desc: Set to true to enable early stopping based on validation loss
_compatible_datasets: METR_LA (207 nodes), PEMS_BAY (325 nodes), PEMSD4 (307 nodes), PEMSD7 (883 nodes)
_required_features: Geo coordinates (.geo file) required for KDTree spatial partitioning
